_comment: Opportunity: Forgotten Inheritance. Per opportunity directive: the engine continuously asks 'what opportunities naturally exist at a location that has existed for 1000 years?'. Discoverable by cultivation (Foundation Establishment), perception (Core Formation (to find the seal)), and luck (modifier 1.0). Prime Directive: opportunity exists objectively; player perception determines whether they find it.
name: Forgotten Inheritance
description: A cultivator's inheritance left for a successor, sealed in a cave or formation. Exists because: a cultivator reached end-of-life and chose to leave their legacy.
why_untaken: Sealed by the cultivator's formation; requires specific cultivation/perception to find.
natural_next_event: If unclaimed for 10000+ years, the seal weakens and beasts claim it.

simulation_notes.continuous_inference: The World State Engine continuously infers opportunities at every location based on the location's age, type, and history.
simulation_notes.no_locked_upgrades: A cultivator who later reaches the required perception will find opportunities they previously missed; the opportunities do not disappear.
simulation_notes.canon_fidelity: This is how Wang Lin found inheritances throughout his journey — the opportunities existed before he arrived; his perception determined what he found.

karmic_weight.description: No specific karmic consequence recorded in canon
